title: Light microscopic analysis of synaptic input to neurons in the rat major pelvic ganglion [keast-003]
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"edskd","text":"This collection describes the procedures required to visualise and characterize synaptic boutons associated with functionally classified pelvic ganglion autonomic neurons of adult male and female Sprague-Dawley rats. This collection includes protocols for:","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"48t23","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"ceet7","text":"STAGE 1: Surgery to micro-inject fluorescent retrograde tracer dyes into one or more sites within the lower urinary tract","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"9p34c","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"fkeqj","text":"STAGE 2: Intracardiac perfusion with fixative to preserve neural tissues of interest","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"7n24g","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"6fs57","text":"STAGE 3: Immunohistochemical labeling of thick cryosections of pelvic ganglia","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"fccc5","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"9akmg","text":"STAGE 4: Confocal microscopy and image analysis of synaptic boutons associated with ganglion neurons.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{}}
